```{r}
#| label: part-tbl-grants
#| tbl-cap: "Research Grant Income"
if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
  read.csv("../data/Grant_income.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Amount = scales::comma(Amount, prefix = "£")) %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Source", "Role", "Start", "End", "People", "Title", "Full Economic Costs (£)", "Type"),
      align = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "r", "l"),
      format = "latex",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      escape = FALSE,
      longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      font_size = 9,
      latex_options = c("repeat_header")
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width = "1.5cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(2, width = "1.5cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width = "1.2cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "1.2cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(5, width = "2cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(6, width = "4cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(7, width = "2cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(8, width = "1.5cm")
} else {
  read.csv("../data/Grant_income.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Amount = scales::comma(Amount, prefix = "£")) %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Source", "Role", "Start", "End", "People", "Title", "Full Economic Costs (£)", "Type"),
      align = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "r", "l"),
      format = "pipe",
      caption = "Research Grant Income",
      escape = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
      full_width = FALSE,
      position = "left"
    )
}
```
